name: Reuben Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beef, onion, and ground pepper together. Form into 4 patties that are about 3/4 inch thick.
2. Grill or broil the patties, 4 inches from the heat source, for 3 minutes on each side until they reach medium-rare doneness.
3. Place 1 to 2 tablespoons of sauerkraut in the center of each patty and top with one 1 oz slice of low-fat Swiss cheese.
4. Grill until the cheese melts, about 1 to 2 minutes.
5. Serve each patty open-face on a slice of toasted or grilled rye bread.
6. Top each serving with 1 tablespoon of Russian Dressing.
Joslin Exchange per serving: 3 MEDIUM-FAT EXCHANGES + 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE
CAL: 348; PRO: 28g; CAR: 18g (CALORIES FROM FAT, 46%); FIB: 1g CHO: 72mg; SODIUM: 460mg POTOSSIUM: 387mg;
Souce: Joslin Diabetes Gourmet Cookbook
